insight_events.title: Growth regime upshift

risk_claims.claim: *Primary risk: mNAV compression combined with dilution from convertibles and perpetual preferred issuance while BTC marks reverse.
Mark volatility: Q1 2026 unrealized loss $14.5B on one quarter’s BTC move (10-Q).
Liquidity / refinancing: $8.2B+ debt maturities concentrated years 2–3 (10-Q debt table).
